<!-- Portfolio Website Project Setup Instructions -->

# Portfolio Website Setup Checklist

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Static Portfolio Website
- **Technology**: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript
- **Design**: Clean, elegant, modern with soft unique colors
- **Features**: Responsive design, smooth animations, portfolio sections

## Setup Steps

- [x] Create .github directory and copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Verify project requirements (Portfolio website - clean, elegant, modern design)
- [x] Scaffold project structure (HTML, CSS, JS, assets folders)
- [x] Create HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files
- [x] Setup responsive design and animations
- [x] Create README.md documentation
- [ ] Test and launch project in browser

## Project Structure
```
portofolio/
├── .github/
│   └── copilot-instructions.md
├── index.html
├── css/
│   └── styles.css
├── js/
│   └── script.js
├── images/
├── README.md
└── .gitignore
```

## Design Guidelines
- **Color Scheme**: Soft, elegant palette with unique accent colors
- **Typography**: Modern, clean font choices
- **Layout**: Mobile-first responsive design
- **Animations**: Smooth, subtle transitions
- **Sections**: About, Projects, Skills, Contact

## Next Steps
1. Review generated files
2. Customize content and colors
3. Add project images to images/ folder
4. Test responsiveness on different devices
5. Deploy to preferred hosting platform
